Regardless of how he spins it, it’s voter suppression and  nothing more.

For 16 years, the federal minimum wage has been stuck at just $7.25 an hour while the cost of living has continued to rise. Working full-time should mean being able to afford housing, groceries, healthcare, and other basic necessities, not struggling to get by.

It is beyond reform. 

It’s time to dismantle ICE and build an immigration system that upholds justice, accountability, and the rule of law.
